meaning: 清洁,使清洁的人或物;adj.有去污作用的
examples: Sales of cleansing milks, creams, and gels have doubled over the past decade.
No amount of cleansing or mineral water consumption can guarantee a clear skin.
The cleansing of the temple in 164 B.C. is what Jews celebrate with Hanukkah.
Mental Floss, one of my favorite sites, has a namesake that conjures brain cleansing.
Nor is precipitating a depression the most expeditious way of cleansing bank and corporate balance sheets.
